title: だれかの心臓になれたなら

section_analysis.description: Literary narrative. Focus on the 'Warped World'. Rhythmic piano-led tension.
High-velocity emotional release. 'Ai wo kudasai' (Give me love) motif. Intense percussive delivery.

lyrics.original: 「愛をください」 きっとだれもがそう願った
lyrics.romaji: Ai wo kudasai Kitto daremo ga sou negatta
lyrics.meta: Signature motif. Desperate plea for love.

lyrics.original: 僕の地獄で君はいつでも 絶えず鼓動する心臓だ
lyrics.romaji: Boku no jigoku de kimi wa itsu demo taezu kodou suru shinzou da
lyrics.meta: Core thematic line. Living source of hope in 'Hell'.

stylistic_dna.vocal_texture: GUMI - Powerful, rhythmic, emotive high register
stylistic_dna.main_instrument: Percussive Piano, Aggressive Electric Guitar, Driving Rock Drums
signature_phrases: 愛をください (Give me love)
